TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Kinus, title = Kinus, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Kinus} }

S.FORM: alang Kinus ga niya mki sku Girang Keng atu Nango go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 60 buwan, 179 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 97% kyan ku 174 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 3% kyan ku 5 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 88%, Amis 1%, Truku 2%, Bunun 3%, Paywan 2%, binah lihuyan s'uli 2%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Kinus hya' ga K'yang. tay mkyahu' na Kinus hya' ga Kmuyaw. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Kinus ga niya mki sku Girang Keng atu Nango go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 60 buwan, 179 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 97% kyan ku 174 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 3% kyan ku 5 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 88%, Amis 1%, Truku 2%, Bunun 3%, Paywan 2%, binah lihuyan s'uli 2%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Kinus hya' ga K'yang. tay mkyahu' na Kinus hya' ga Kmuyaw. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŇč kinus~…ē …£a nija mki s~…ēku …£iraŇč keŇč atu naŇčo …£o, kwara s~…ēali ő≤uwan nja …£a ** ő≤uwan, *** ńßi ku kwara s~…ē Ēuli tajan. s~…ē Ēuli tajan pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku *** ńßi, ő≤inańß …£a, Ējat kańßun s~…ēku pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a *% kjan ku * ńßi nja. pins~…ēpuŇč na linńßujan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a, tajan **%, amis~…ē *%, truku *%, ő≤unun *%, pajwan *%, ő≤inańß lińßujan s~…ē Ēuli *%. rńßzjal kki Ēan taj mkraja Ē na kinus~…ē ńßja Ē …£a k ĒjaŇč. taj mkjańßu Ē na kinus~…ē ńßja Ē …£a kmujaw. rekis~…ēi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~…ēs~…ēquliq pinlp…£an ppqő≤aqan pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē ¶~ ®ikuj maki * pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē ¶~ ®ikuj. pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē mrkjas~…ē tuqi Ēs~…ēan ő≤as~…ēu kis~…ēja Ē …£l…£an s~…ēpjaŇčan na pinő≤ańßu uő≤uj qqmajńß
